EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IAMFWriter

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that control the sequential writing of AMF.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("3EB8C519-D125-48D4-AEB6-608074316AD4")]
public interface IAMFWriter

Properties

Stream

Obtains underlying stream.

IStream Stream { get; }

Property Value

IStream

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

EndAMF3Array()

Finishes writing an array.

void EndAMF3Array()

Examples

Sample Snippet

EndAMF3Object()

Finishes writing object.

void EndAMF3Object()

Examples

Sample Snippet

EndAMF3ObjectTraits()

Call this method to finish writing object traits and switch to writing members.

void EndAMF3ObjectTraits()

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetCopy(out IAMFWriter)

Clones IAMFWriter. Useful when you want to preserve traits and object, string and trait references.

void GetCopy(out IAMFWriter ppOutWriter)

Parameters

ppOutWriter IAMFWriter

Examples

Sample Snippet

StartAMF3Array(int, out int)

Starts writing of array. Returns object reference index.

void StartAMF3Array(int denseCount, out int obj_ref)

Parameters

denseCount int
obj_ref int

Examples

Sample Snippet

StartAMF3CustomObject(string, out int)

Starst writing a custom object. Contents of this kind of objects are user-defined.

void StartAMF3CustomObject(string classname, out int obj_ref)

Parameters

classname string
obj_ref int

Examples

Sample Snippet

StartAMF3Object(int, out int)

Starts writing an object, sends traits by reference. Returns object reference index.

void StartAMF3Object(int traits_ref, out int obj_ref)

Parameters

traits_ref int
obj_ref int

Examples

Sample Snippet

StartAMF3ObjectWithTraits(string, int, bool, out int, out int)

Start writing an object with traits. Returns trait reference index end object reference index.

void StartAMF3ObjectWithTraits(string classname, int MemberCount, bool dynamic, out int traits_ref, out int obj_ref)

Parameters

classname string
MemberCount int
dynamic bool
traits_ref int
obj_ref int

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3ArrayDenseMarker()

Switches from writing of associative portion of an array to dense portion.

void WriteAMF3ArrayDenseMarker()

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3ArrayRef(int)

Writes an array by reference.

void WriteAMF3ArrayRef(int obj_ref)

Parameters

obj_ref int

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3Bool(bool)

Writes boolean value.

void WriteAMF3Bool(bool Value)

Parameters

Value bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3ByteArray(ref byte[], out int)

Writes byte array. Returns object reference index. Note that this is not an AMF3 array but another type - AMF3 byte array.

void WriteAMF3ByteArray(ref byte[] ppArray, out int obj_ref)

Parameters

ppArray byte[]
obj_ref int

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3ByteArrayRef(int)

Writes byte array by reference. Note that this is not an AMF3 array but another type - AMF3 byte array.

void WriteAMF3ByteArrayRef(int obj_ref)

Parameters

obj_ref int

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3Date(DateTime, bool, out int)

Writes date. Returns object reference index.

void WriteAMF3Date(DateTime Value, bool asJsonNumber, out int obj_ref)

Parameters

Value DateTime
asJsonNumber bool
obj_ref int

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3DateRef(int)

Writes date by reference. Important: do not use this method if you send dates as JSON numbers, references will be incorrect.

void WriteAMF3DateRef(int obj_ref)

Parameters

obj_ref int

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3Double(double)

Writes double (64-bit) value.

void WriteAMF3Double(double Value)

Parameters

Value double

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3Int(int)

Writes integer (32-bit) value.

void WriteAMF3Int(int Value)

Parameters

Value int

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3Null()

Writes null value.

void WriteAMF3Null()

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3ObjectRef(int)

Writes object by reference.

void WriteAMF3ObjectRef(int obj_ref)

obj_ref int

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3String(string, out int)

Writes string value. Returns string reference index.

void WriteAMF3String(string Value, out int string_ref)

Parameters

Value string
string_ref int

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3StringRef(int)

Writes string value by reference.

void WriteAMF3StringRef(int string_ref)

string_ref int

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3Undefined()

Writes undefined value.

void WriteAMF3Undefined()

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3Variant(object, out int)

Writes value types (excluding array and object), may return string or object reference index. If reference is not applicable, value_ref is set to -1.

void WriteAMF3Variant(object Value, out int value_ref)

Parameters

Value object
value_ref int

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3Xml(string, out int)

Writes XML. Returns object reference index.

void WriteAMF3Xml(string Value, out int obj_ref)

Parameters

Value string
obj_ref int

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3XmlDoc(string, out int)

Writes XML document. Returns object reference index.

void WriteAMF3XmlDoc(string Value, out int obj_ref)

Parameters

Value string
obj_ref int

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3XmlDocRef(int)

Writes XML document by reference.

void WriteAMF3XmlDocRef(int obj_ref)

Parameters

obj_ref int

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3XmlRef(int)

Writes XML by reference.

void WriteAMF3XmlRef(int obj_ref)

Parameters

obj_ref int

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3_UTF8(string, out int)

This method is required if you want to write member names in traits.

void WriteAMF3_UTF8(string Value, out int string_ref)

Parameters

Value string
string_ref int

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteAMF3_UTF8Ref(int)

This method is required if you want to write member names in traits by reference.

void WriteAMF3_UTF8Ref(int string_ref)

Parameters

string_ref int

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteTo(IStream) 

void WriteTo(IStream outputStream)

Parameters

outputStream IStream

WriteU16(short)

Writes short integer. AMF0 format only. Don't use this method for AMF3 objects.

void WriteU16(short b)

Parameters

b short

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteU32(int)

Writes an integer. AMF0 format only. Don't use this method for AMF3 objects.

void WriteU32(int b)

Parameters

b int

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteU8(byte)

Writes a byte. AMF0 format only. Don't use this method for AMF3 objects.

void WriteU8(byte b)

Parameters

b byte

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteUTF8(string)

This method is used to write AMF0 strings. AMF0 format only. Don't use this method for AMF3 objects.

void WriteUTF8(string Value)

Parameters

Value string

Examples

Sample Snippet
